zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Parker於大約1635年7月出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆時，她的父親John Parker Jr.11632歲，母親Mary Crocombe36歲。她於大約1655年與Thomas Webber在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1715年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Parker于大约1635年7月出生在英国戴文格奧智哈姆时，她的父亲John Parker Jr.11632岁，母亲Mary Crocombe36岁。她于大约1655年与Thomas Webber在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1715年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Parker was born about July 1635, in Georgeham, Devon, England, her father, John Parker Jr., was 11632 and her mother, Mary Crocombe, was 36. She married Thomas Webber about 1655, in Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died on 14 February 1715, in Province of Maine, British Colonial America, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Parker est née environ juillet 1635, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Parker Jr., avait 11632 ans et sa mère, Mary Crocombe, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Webber environ 1655, à Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1715, à Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Parker um Juli 1635 in Georgeham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Parker Jr. 11632 und ihre Mutter Mary Crocombe 36. Sie hat um 1655 in Province of Maine, British Colonial America Thomas Webber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1715 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Parker è nata il circa luglio 1635 nel Georgeham, Devon, England, sua padre, John Parker Jr., aveva 11632 anni e sua madre, Mary Crocombe, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Webber circa 1655, nel Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 14 febbraio 1715, nel Province of Maine, British Colonial America, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Parkerが約1635年7月にイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた時，父John Parker Jr.は11632歳，母Mary Crocombeは36歳であった。約1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインでThomas Webberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1715年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Parker(이)가 대략 1635년 7월 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Parker Jr.(은)는 11632세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Crocombe(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에서 Thomas Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1715년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Parker nasceu aproximadamente julho de 1635, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Parker Jr., tinha 11632 anos e sua mãe, Mary Crocombe, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Webber aproximadamente 1655, em Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1715, em Province of Maine, British Colonial America, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Parker родилась около июль 1635 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Parker Jr. было 11632 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Crocombe, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Webber около 1655 г. в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла 14 февраля 1715 г. в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Parker nació aproximadamente julio de 1635, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Parker Jr., tenía 11632 años y su mamá, Mary Crocombe, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Thomas Webber aproximadamente 1655, en Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1715, en Province of Maine, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años.
